name: mailto-link-generator
title: Mailto Link Generator
description: Build mailto: links with every field — to, cc, bcc, subject and body — then copy them or open a draft.
author: stefan.imbesi

commands.name: generate-mailto
commands.title: Generate Mailto Link
commands.description: Compose a mailto: link from a form, then copy it (raw or as an HTML anchor) or open a draft.

preferences.name: rememberLastValues
preferences.title: Form
preferences.label: Remember last-used values between launches
preferences.description: Off by default — the form opens empty. When on, it restores whatever you last entered.

preferences.name: defaultCc
preferences.title: Default Cc
preferences.description: Pre-filled into the Cc field of a fresh form. Leave empty for none. Separate multiple addresses with commas.

preferences.name: defaultBcc
preferences.title: Default Bcc
preferences.description: Pre-filled into the Bcc field of a fresh form. Leave empty for none.

preferences.name: signature
preferences.title: Signature
preferences.description: Appended to the body of a fresh form after a "-- " delimiter. Leave empty for none. Single-line; use \n for line breaks.

preferences.name: outlookHost
preferences.title: Outlook Account
preferences.description: Which Outlook web app the "Open in Outlook" action should target.
